name: sanofi-elements-local-registry
description: Private local registry for Sanofi Elements AI HTML prototype generation.
source_priority: interface: local DESIGN.md AI-readable design-system contract
primary: Storybook v3.48.3 docs, stories, and CSS bundle
secondary: Zeroheight component catalog and page tabs
derived: local primitive contracts, patterns, templates, rules, examples, and generated prototypes
invalid_or_limited: undersized raw component text captures and private-page HTML shells

remote_refresh_policy.normal_generation: Use this local registry; do not scrape remote docs.
remote_refresh_policy.upstream_update: Refresh local MD/contracts/tokens from new source URLs, then run build-local-registry and validators.
